title: apex-refactorer inputs
description: Typed inputs for the apex-refactorer runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

related_paths.description: Example from AGENT.md: helper classes / existing test class paths Required column: 'no'.

target_org_alias.description: Example from AGENT.md: if set, the agent also calls `validate_against_org("apex/trigger-framework", target_org=...)` Required column: 'no'.
target_org_alias.example: if set, the agent also calls `validate_against_org("apex/trigger-framework", target_org=...)`
